==Barnes Opening, Fool's mate==
===2. g4??===
This move is a blunder (as can be seen by the ??), as it allows Black to immediately checkmate with [[/2...Qh4#|2...Qh4#]]. This is known as Fool's Mate. It is the fastest possible checkmate in a chess game.

==Popular Moves==

2...Qh4# 34%. 2...d5 24%. 2...Nc6 15%. 2...Bc5 8%. All other moves ~15%.
